prompt: Create a wide cinematic mixed-media historical illustration of Ludwig van Beethoven composing at a sacred writing desk while silence transforms into musical genius. Use a dramatic 16:9 horizontal canvas with dense collage energy, painterly realism mixed with ink splatter, torn paper, antique manuscript texture, and sweeping abstract motion. Center-left: a curly-haired early-19th-century composer in a black coat and red scarf bends over a dark wooden desk, writing intensely with one white quill on scattered sheet music; his face is obscured by a soft rectangular blur/shadow rather than detailed facial features. On the desk include exactly 3 visible writing objects: 1 white quill, 1 small black ink pot, and 1 taller brass inkwell. Surround him with exactly 3 historical-symbolic zones: left background shows a smoky Napoleonic battlefield with black flags, soldiers, fire, and a distant domed city under dark storm clouds; right background shows a peaceful pastoral river valley with green trees, hills, bright sky, and sunlight; foreground and midground show an explosive avalanche of musical manuscript pages. Include exactly 1 cello standing upright on the far right, warm brown varnish, partly covered by black and gold splatter. Include exactly 1 black bicorne hat in the lower-left foreground with exactly 2 decorations on it: a rosette cockade and a gold medal or insignia; place exactly 1 red cloth draped beside it. Fill the air with many black musical notes, staff lines, torn notation pages, circular cream-and-gold arcs, ink blots, scratches, and gold paint flecks, as if the music is erupting from the desk toward the pastoral landscape. Color palette: charcoal black, aged parchment cream, sepia brown, smoky gray, deep red accents, and metallic gold. Lighting should be high-contrast and theatrical, with the composer and desk dark and brooding, the right landscape luminous, and the whole image feeling like a baroque collage poster about deafness, war, and the creation of the Fifth and Sixth Symphonies. No readable modern text, no watermark, no clean digital UI, no extra people in the foreground.
